sp_browser_auth.title: SP Services Login (Optional)
sp_browser_auth.description:
Enable electricity and water usage sensors by logging in to SP Services.

**Step 1 — Open the login URL in a browser:**
{auth_url}

**Step 2 — Sign in** with your SP Services / SP Digital account (email + password + SMS OTP sent to your registered mobile).

**Step 3 — Copy the redirect URL.** After the SMS OTP is accepted, your browser will redirect to a URL that starts with `https://services.spservices.sg/callback?fromLogin=true&code=...&state=...` — the page may be blank or show an error, that is normal. Copy the **full URL** from the browser address bar.

**Step 4 — Paste it below** and click Submit.

---
Leave the field empty and click Submit to skip.

data.callback_url: Callback URL (paste full URL from browser address bar)

reauth_browser_auth.title: Re-authenticate SP Services
reauth_browser_auth.description:
Your SP Services session has expired. Log in again to restore usage sensors.

**Step 1 — Open the login URL in a browser:**
{auth_url}

**Step 2 — Sign in** with your SP Services / SP Digital account (email + password + SMS OTP).

**Step 3 — Copy the redirect URL.** After the SMS OTP is accepted, your browser will redirect to a URL starting with `https://services.spservices.sg/callback?fromLogin=true&code=...&state=...` — the page may look blank or broken, that is normal. Copy the **full URL** from the address bar.

**Step 4 — Paste it below** and click Submit.

data.callback_url: Callback URL (paste full URL from browser address bar)

error.name_too_long: Name must be 64 characters or fewer.
error.sp_cannot_connect: Could not connect to SP Services. Check your network connection and try again.
error.sp_invalid_callback: The callback URL could not be exchanged for a token. Make sure you copied the entire URL from the browser address bar — it should start with https://services.spservices.sg/callback?fromLogin=true&code= and include both code= and state= parameters.
